h7bd0fddfg714ag40aeg91c4g9b1c084cfc66: I've seen enough blood today, all right?
h3c61473eg3ec5g4145g97ebgb6fd84fca8b6: I'm not staying in this damned place.
h70cbfe3dg2b1bg4f08g8ea6g9cbcdb38a873: ... oh, damnation. My friends - what... what happened?
h8a0eedceg5427g4df7g975eg89f39248c96e: The same thing that happens to anyone who takes up arms against me.
h0b6a437bgd3e4g4768g8c73g1bca8afd9ec5: Arms? We're damn fisherfolk! We saw the crash and came to help, more fool us.
hbec969c6ge668g4ed9g9256g502c83a3e014: That thing was in the wreckage. Whatever it did... imagine everyone you've ever loved, screaming for help in one voice.
hcfdc0d9cg4eb5g4c1dg929eg45a5035711aa: It... drew us. We couldn't stop even when we dashed our boat against the shore. What now?
hd48a75b7g2403g429dgb829g2ca6d677a1cf: It could be worse - your ship didn't fall from the sky.
ha4bad2a5g8b3cg4c0aga5f7gdb40b404bb45: It's where you landed that matters. The middle of bloody nowhere. Now-
h6d75fd6cg0e7dg41f5g8252gfe3ef331a54b: Wait. Your mind - I can... feel it. You're like them - those creatures!
ha0b446fdg9730g4a92gbf46g2ba4bee5fb67: What? I saved you from that thing.
h1f47bba8gb727g4aadgbbd3g4ec7f8ca6741: No! Just... just keep away, all right? I'll go my way, you go yours. Please.
h0fe183aag1d8ag4a44g9912gf20f6cd9ff23: No! Just... just keep away, all right? We'll go our way, you go yours. Please.
h99d95166g2905g42eegb20eg72bd99a9e134: No. They did... something to me, but I escaped.
he7f278b6g2891g476eg964egf64aecdb2e09: Show some gratitude, or you'll find that I'm a lot worse.
h5077e19agedc6g4b7fga082gae806a8343c9: First things first. Where are we?
hab7d5783gb193g4869g883dge29157ac5a10: The back-arse of beyond. Baldur's Gate is a few days downriver, but -
he2559f91g77fcg4652g9445gb87a7178d2cf: Your boat - can it be repaired?
h13465b10g231bg44a7g8c1bg6853343e0540: By who? We're miles from anyone and anywhere. Even if -
ha7c7fc0bg06afg40ccga0bagd185162bd226: Figure it out yourself. I have neither time nor patience to train a new slave.
hbb83d775gbe07g4fe3gb9eeg2b00c8185150: I'm no more eager to cosy up to you, drow, but we're in the wilderness. If we want to -
ha0e605a3g3ea4g444agaf14g931a4c15fdad: Start by handing over your valuables.
h35ad179fg2190g4937g91a4ga6a126890b44: I was defending myself. I'm sorry.
h1728df14gcba3g4945g9e8cg9d3779b6214c: ... aye, me and all. We were fishing - just getting ready to haul our nets in when we saw the crash.
hae3b5323gb724g4297g884bg8cb891c63971: That monster was using you like a puppet.
h6bc6d5dfg7229g4d4egace0g4e85bb199fec: Aye, I... I remember now. We saw the crash from out on the river, flocked to it like damn fools.
h5848bcb9g30cdg4ae2gb1c2g0b58ccf32415: Whatever was happening, it ended with that monster.
h904845cag3cdfg4446g84b3g8e10b71646bb: Good riddance. We were fishing on the river when we saw the crash.
hf8219586g7991g4d66g8f83g26c04e914670: Aye... I remember. We saw the crash from the river, and heard... something.
h0b5892aeg64adg4a65g9d47gd22d2875b867: Calm? One moment we're hauling in our nets, and the next the damn sky is falling in!
h9603ee51ge096g40f0g82c0g96ec3c2f7a26: You allowed the ghaik to use you. You're unclean.
hfca57e59g9be9g4024g863bgca4ee100fab1: We came to help. Umberlee's law - never pass a wreck. Even if it... comes from the sky.
h8f7dd7aag8f63g4b89gb01dg1a949dd422c2: ... oh, damnation. My friend, Gan - what...what happened?
h5075d263g1c62g48e0gb692gac1c705f6782: ... oh, damnation. My friend, Thale - what...what happened?
h1c0d3f31gf840g484cgaceagc9cc3e3069cd: ... the voice. Oh, gods, the voice. What happened!?
h3543a07eg404eg48edg9d97g40bb95aed951: You tried to kill me, that's what.
hf48283cag2ed6g4ca1ga7fag9ab85bc34a20: That monster was using you like a puppet.
hbb22ca6cg79a9g4486gb40dg10cb64ab0629: It looked like you were helping that thing.
h437bd79agb3c5g4ef0gb985g9a8d2abbefe7: This voice - what was it saying?
h58c45c92g61d4g4a45g8b38g06331fca2499: ... imagine everyone you've ever loved, screaming for help in one voice. It drove us mad.
h293b2e0fg8d36g4077gaf03g10829daf96a7: We shouldn't have come here... we had to come here.
